Age.potential_issues: No obvious formatting issues; should be checked for unrealistic ages or age-related bias concerns.

Attrition.semantic_meaning: Whether the employee has left the company or is considered attrited.
Attrition.potential_issues: Binary boolean field appears clean; confirm whether True means left and False means retained.

BusinessTravel.potential_issues: Category labels use underscores and may need normalization for reporting.

DailyRate.semantic_meaning: Employee daily pay rate or internal daily compensation rate.
DailyRate.potential_issues: Meaning may be ambiguous versus actual salary; units/currency not specified.

Department.semantic_meaning: Organizational department where the employee works.

DistanceFromHome.semantic_meaning: Distance between employee home and workplace, likely in miles or kilometers.
DistanceFromHome.potential_issues: Unit of measure is not specified.

Education.semantic_meaning: Employee education level encoded as an ordinal scale.
Education.potential_issues: Numeric codes 1-5 require a lookup to interpret correctly; should be treated as ordinal rather than continuous.

EducationField.potential_issues: Appears clean; category 'Other' is broad and may reduce interpretability.

EmployeeCount.semantic_meaning: Count of employees represented by the row, likely a constant placeholder.
EmployeeCount.potential_issues: Only one unique value (1); non-informative and likely removable.

EmployeeNumber.potential_issues: Unique key only; should not be used as a predictive numeric feature.

EnvironmentSatisfaction.semantic_meaning: Employee satisfaction with work environment, likely on a 1-4 ordinal scale.
EnvironmentSatisfaction.potential_issues: Encoded ordinal values need label mapping; should not be treated as purely continuous.

Gender.potential_issues: Sensitive demographic attribute; potential fairness and compliance concerns.

HourlyRate.semantic_meaning: Employee hourly pay rate or internal hourly compensation metric.
HourlyRate.potential_issues: Units/currency not specified; may not align directly with monthly income.

JobInvolvement.semantic_meaning: Employee level of involvement or engagement in their job, likely on a 1-4 ordinal scale.
JobInvolvement.potential_issues: Ordinal coded values require interpretation mapping.

JobLevel.semantic_meaning: Employee seniority or grade level within the organization.
JobLevel.potential_issues: Ordinal numeric codes should not be treated as continuous without care.

JobRole.semantic_meaning: Specific employee job title or role category.
JobRole.potential_issues: Appears clean; some roles may overlap semantically with department.

JobSatisfaction.semantic_meaning: Employee satisfaction with their job, likely on a 1-4 ordinal scale.
JobSatisfaction.potential_issues: Ordinal coded values need label mapping.

MaritalStatus.potential_issues: Sensitive personal attribute; may raise fairness/privacy concerns.

MonthlyIncome.semantic_meaning: Employee monthly income or salary amount.
MonthlyIncome.potential_issues: Currency not specified; should be checked for outliers and consistency with other pay fields.

MonthlyRate.semantic_meaning: Monthly pay rate or internal monthly billing/payroll rate associated with the employee.
MonthlyRate.potential_issues: Potential ambiguity versus MonthlyIncome; business definition should be confirmed.

NumCompaniesWorked.semantic_meaning: Number of companies the employee worked for before or including current employment context.
NumCompaniesWorked.potential_issues: Definition should be confirmed whether current employer is included.

Over18.semantic_meaning: Whether the employee is over 18 years old.
Over18.potential_issues: Only one unique value (True); non-informative and likely removable.

OverTime.potential_issues: Binary field appears clean; confirm whether this reflects current status or historical pattern.

PercentSalaryHike.semantic_meaning: Percentage increase in employee salary, likely from the last review cycle.
PercentSalaryHike.potential_issues: Time reference is not explicit; should confirm whether this is annual or last raise only.

PerformanceRating.potential_issues: Only two observed values (3 and 4), suggesting limited variance; ordinal coding should be interpreted carefully.

RelationshipSatisfaction.semantic_meaning: Employee satisfaction with workplace relationships, likely on a 1-4 ordinal scale.
RelationshipSatisfaction.potential_issues: Ordinal coded values require mapping to descriptive labels.

StandardHours.semantic_meaning: Standard expected working hours, likely per pay period or week context defined by the source system.
StandardHours.potential_issues: Only one unique value (80); non-informative and unit/time basis is unclear.

StockOptionLevel.semantic_meaning: Level or tier of stock option benefits assigned to the employee.
StockOptionLevel.potential_issues: Ordinal encoded values need business definition for interpretation.

TotalWorkingYears.semantic_meaning: Total years of professional work experience.
TotalWorkingYears.potential_issues: Should be checked for consistency with Age and employment history.

TrainingTimesLastYear.semantic_meaning: Number of training sessions or training events completed in the last year.
TrainingTimesLastYear.potential_issues: Definition of 'training times' may vary; confirm whether zero means none recorded or missing.
